scripts.deploy: npm run test && astro build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.test: tsx scripts/parser-check.ts && tsx scripts/view-check.ts && tsx scripts/overlay-check.ts && tsx scripts/secret-check.ts && tsx scripts/secret-warnings-check.ts && tsx scripts/secret-scrub-check.ts && tsx scripts/artifacts-check.ts && tsx scripts/download-check.ts && tsx scripts/diff-check.ts && tsx scripts/slug-check.ts && tsx scripts/oembed-check.ts
